objective: Refactor lib toward explicit root entrypoints/facades plus focused shared contracts/helpers. Root keeps app.dart compatibility facade plus main.dart and main_e2e.dart entrypoints; implementation lives under app/, core/, features/, router/, shared/, testing/, theme/. Shared-code objective extracted wire JSON coercion, E2E channel fixture, endpoint URI normalization, gateway config, pairing descriptor contracts, shared profile health labels, count labels, profile contact label/status policy, and reused Navivox JSON helpers in profile/run-record presentation code.
completedSlices: Extracted shared Navivox wire JSON coercion helpers to lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart and reused them from gateway and memory protocol decoders.
Moved NavivoxApp implementation from root lib/app.dart to lib/app/navivox_app.dart while keeping lib/app.dart as public compatibility export.
Extracted E2EMockChannel from lib/main_e2e.dart to lib/testing/e2e_mock_channel.dart so the root e2e entrypoint remains thin.
Extracted endpoint URI normalization helpers to lib/core/protocol/navivox_endpoint_uri.dart and reused them from gateway pairing parsing and setup QR import parsing.

Extracted NavivoxGatewayConfig to lib/core/gateway/navivox_gateway_config.dart and NavivoxPairingDescriptor to lib/core/protocol/navivox_pairing_descriptor.dart; kept lib/core/gateway/navivox_gateway_protocol.dart compatibility exports and updated setup QR parsing to import the focused pairing descriptor contract directly.
Extracted shared profile health label policy to lib/shared/presentation/profile_health_labels.dart and reused it from profile contacts, settings, chat screen, and voice readiness presentations.
Extracted shared count-label helper to lib/shared/presentation/count_labels.dart and reused it from settings, servers overview, and chat project status presentation.

Reused existing Navivox JSON coercion helpers from lib/core/protocol/navivox_json.dart in profile seed sheet, profile voice profile card, and transcript run-record presentation instead of local duplicate map/string/list coercion.

Extracted shared profile contact label/status policy to lib/shared/presentation/profile_contact_labels.dart and reused it from memory dashboard scope/error labels and chat screen profile status/project labels.
validationReceipts: folder_refactor_audit target=lib plannedTopologyComplete=true facadeFiles=[app.dart, main.dart, main_e2e.dart] nextCandidateFiles=[]: passed.
